items.title: Hypoxic CA9-high mesenchymal-like glioma stem cells promote ANXA1-FPR1-dependent macrophage polarization in recurrent glioblastoma.
items.authors: Hangqi Gao; Guiting You; Jianhuang Huang; Yijing Lin; Jiexin Huang; Risheng Liang; Caihou Lin
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Recurrent glioblastoma (rGBM) is characterized by marked myeloid remodeling and a profoundly immunosuppressive microenvironment. Although carbonic anhydrase 9 (CA9) is a canonical hypoxia-inducible molecule linked to aggressive glioblastoma (GBM) behavior, its cell-state-specific distribution in rGBM and its role in glioma stem cell (GSC)-macrophage crosstalk remain incompletely understood. METHODS: We integrated public transcriptomic cohorts, single-cell RNA sequencing, quantitative proteomics, paired clinical specimens, and in vitro/in vivo functional assays to define the role of CA9 in rGBM. Malignant-cell states and tumor-associated macrophage (TAM) subpopulations were resolved at single-cell resolution, and intercellular communication was inferred computationally. CA9 gain- and loss-of-function models were established in GBM cell lines and patient-derived GSCs. ANXA1 expression and secretion were assessed by qRT-PCR, Western blotting, ELISA, and promoter-reporter assays. Macrophage polarization was evaluated using conditioned-medium transfer, recombinant ANXA1 rescue, and pharmacological FPR1 blockade with cyclosporin H. RESULTS: CA9 was upregulated in GBM, further enriched in mesenchymal and recurrent tumors, and associated with inferior survival. Single-cell analysis localized CA9 predominantly to a hypoxia-associated MES-like GSC subpopulation that expanded in recurrent samples and exhibited elevated stemness. Recurrent tumors also displayed increased SPP1 + immunosuppressive TAMs. Proteomic, transcriptomic, and cell-cell communication analyses prioritized ANXA1 as a CA9-associated downstream mediator with secreted immunomodulatory potential. Hypoxia induced both CA9 and ANXA1, and mutation of a hypoxia-response element attenuated ANXA1 promoter activation. CA9 depletion reduced ANXA1 expression and secretion, impaired GBM growth phenotypes, and attenuated hypoxia-driven ANXA1 induction. CellChat highlighted enhanced signaling between hypoxic MES-like GSCs and SPP1 + TAMs in recurrent GBM, nominating ANXA1-FPR1 as a leading ligand-receptor axis. Functionally, conditioned medium from CA9-high GBM cells promoted M2-like macrophage polarization, which was weakened by CA9 knockdown, partially restored by recombinant ANXA1, and markedly suppressed by FPR1 antagonism, supporting ANXA1 as a contributory paracrine mediator, and markedly suppressed by FPR1 antagonism. In vivo, CA9 depletion, and in CA9-intact tumors FPR1 blockade, reduced M2-like macrophage-associated signals. CONCLUSIONS: CA9 is enriched in hypoxic MES-like GSCs in rGBM and promotes an ANXA1-dependent paracrine program that supports immunosuppressive macrophage polarization. These findings identify a CA9-ANXA1-FPR1-associated neuroimmune crosstalk axis linking hypoxic stem-like tumor states to myeloid remodeling in recurrent GBM, with ANXA1 functioning as a contributory paracrine mediator rather than a sole effector of CA9-driven immunosuppression.

items.title_cn: 缺氧的 CA9 高间充质样胶质瘤干细胞促进复发性胶质母细胞瘤中 ANXA1-FPR1 依赖性巨噬细胞极化。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：复发性胶质母细胞瘤（rGBM）的特点是明显的骨髓重塑和严重的免疫抑制微环境。尽管碳酸酐酶 9 (CA9) 是一种与侵袭性胶质母细胞瘤 (GBM) 行为相关的典型缺氧诱导分子，但其在 rGBM 中的细胞状态特异性分布及其在胶质瘤干细胞 (GSC)-巨噬细胞串扰中的作用仍不完全清楚。方法：我们整合了公共转录组学队列、单细胞 RNA 测序、定量蛋白质组学、配对临床标本和体外/体内功能测定，以确定 CA9 在 rGBM 中的作用。以单细胞分辨率解析恶性肿瘤细胞状态和肿瘤相关巨噬细胞 (TAM) 亚群，并通过计算推断细胞间通讯。在 GBM 细胞系和患者来源的 GSC 中建立了 CA9 功能获得和丧失模型。通过 qRT-PCR、蛋白质印迹、ELISA 和启动子报告基因测定评估 ANXA1 表达和分泌。使用条件培养基转移、重组 ANXA1 拯救和用环孢素 H 药理学 FPR1 阻断来评估巨噬细胞极化。 结果：CA9 在 GBM 中上调，在间充质和复发肿瘤中进一步富集，并与较差的生存率相关。单细胞分析将 CA9 主要定位于缺氧相关的 MES 样 GSC 亚群，该亚群在重复样本中扩增并表现出较高的干性。复发性肿瘤还表现出 SPP1 + 免疫抑制 TAM 增加。蛋白质组学、转录组学和细胞间通讯分析优先考虑 ANXA1 作为具有分泌免疫调节潜力的 CA9 相关下游介质。缺氧诱导 CA9 和 ANXA1，缺氧反应元件的突变减弱了 ANXA1 启动子的激活。 CA9耗竭减少了ANXA1的表达和分泌，损害了GBM生长表型，并减弱了缺氧驱动的ANXA1诱导。 CellChat 强调了复发性 GBM 中缺氧 MES 样 GSC 和 SPP1 + TAM 之间信号传导的增强，指定 ANXA1-FPR1 作为主要配体-受体轴。从功能上讲，来自 CA9 高 GBM 细胞的条件培养基促进 M2 样巨噬细胞极化，……

items.title: A nucleic acid labeling chemistry reveals surface DNA on exosomes.
items.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
items.authors: Filip Bošković; Priyanka Dutta Gupta; Jian Zhang; Yamuna Krishnan; Jack W Szostak
items.abstract: Chemical labeling of nucleic acids is essential to pinpoint the structure, localization, and function of RNA and DNA. Yet, reversible sequence-independent chemistries that can label native RNA and DNA remain poorly developed. Here, we describe Reversible Uridine Nitrilium-mediated Addition (RUNA), a reversible covalent chemistry that selectively modifies uridine and thymidine residues via N3 deprotonation and reaction with a nitrilium ion intermediate generated from an aldehyde and an isonitrile. The reaction forms a stable N3 adduct that can be quantitatively reversed by hydrolysis. By using reagents that are either membrane permeable or impermeable, we demonstrate the localization and function of DNA on exosomes. Although exosomes harbor nucleic acids, whether the latter are encapsulated in the exosome lumen or are surface-adhered is unknown. RUNA revealed that exosomes display DNA on their outer surface. The abundance of such surface DNA increases upon DNA-damage accumulation in cancer cells that are treated with a PARP inhibitor. This surface DNA drives exosome uptake by M2-polarized macrophages through scavenger receptors and triggers a shift toward an M1-like proinflammatory state. The selective labeling of surface DNA revealed an unexpected mechanism by which exosomes engage innate immune cells. RUNA is a versatile tool to analyze the nucleic acid content and functionality of extracellular vesicles in health and disease.
items.title_en: A nucleic acid labeling chemistry reveals surface DNA on exosomes.
items.title_cn: 核酸标记化学揭示了外泌体的表面 DNA。
items.abstract_cn: 核酸的化学标记对于查明 RNA 和 DNA 的结构、定位和功能至关重要。然而，能够标记天然 RNA 和 DNA 的、与序列无关的可逆化学方法仍然进展缓慢。在这里，我们描述了可逆尿苷腈介导的加成 (RUNA)，这是一种可逆共价化学，通过 N3 去质子化以及与醛和异腈生成的腈离子中间体反应，选择性地修饰尿苷和胸苷残基。该反应形成稳定的 N3 加合物，可通过水解定量逆转。通过使用膜可渗透或不可渗透的试剂，我们证明了 DNA 在外泌体上的定位和功能。尽管外泌体含有核酸，但后者是否被封装在外泌体腔内或表面粘附尚不清楚。 RUNA 揭示外泌体在其外表面展示 DNA。在用 PARP 抑制剂处理的癌细胞中，DNA 损伤积累后，这种表面 DNA 的丰度就会增加。这种表面 DNA 通过清道夫受体驱动 M2 极化巨噬细胞摄取外泌体，并引发向 M1 样促炎状态的转变。表面 DNA 的选择性标记揭示了外泌体与先天免疫细胞相互作用的意想不到的机制。 RUNA 是一种多功能工具，用于分析健康和疾病中细胞外囊泡的核酸含量和功能。

items.title: The pyroptosis cascade between inflammatory endothelial cells and microglia facilitates BBB disruption in bacterial meningitis.
items.authors: Yangyang Zheng; Zhiyue Wu; Fei Wu; Hanyu Hu; Jiaxiu Ma; Guokun Zhang; Hao Sun; Xiaoya Li
items.abstract: Neonatal meningitis-causing Escherichia coli (NMEC) is a primary etiological agent of neonatal meningitis. Inflammatory cell death triggered by NMEC infection has been implicated as a critical determinant of blood-brain barrier (BBB) disruption and neuroinflammation. However, the mechanisms underlying inflammatory BBB breakdown and the propagation of inflammation within the neuroinflammatory milieu remain poorly understood. Here, we show that brain endothelial cells (ECs) undergo GSDMD-dependent pyroptosis in response to NMEC infection. Through integrated spatiotemporal single-cell transcriptomic, epigenomic, and proteomic analyses, we identify Gbp5 as a key regulator of pyroptosis in brain ECs. Moreover, we uncovered a homeostasis-to-inflammation transition in both ECs and microglia (MG), whereby pyroptotic ECs promote microglial pyroptosis via Angptl4-Sdc4 signaling. This intercellular communication establishes a "pyroptosis cascade" between BBB ECs and microglia in the central nervous system (CNS), providing mechanistic insight into inflammatory BBB disruption and revealing potential therapeutic targets within the CNS immune microenvironment.
items.title_en: The pyroptosis cascade between inflammatory endothelial cells and microglia facilitates BBB disruption in bacterial meningitis.
items.title_cn: 炎症内皮细胞和小胶质细胞之间的焦亡级联促进细菌性脑膜炎中 BBB 的破坏。
items.abstract_cn: 引起新生儿脑膜炎的大肠杆菌（NMEC）是新生儿脑膜炎的主要病原体。 NMEC 感染引发的炎症细胞死亡被认为是血脑屏障 (BBB) 破坏和神经炎症的关键决定因素。然而，炎症性血脑屏障破坏和神经炎症环境内炎症传播的机制仍知之甚少。在这里，我们发现脑内皮细胞（EC）响应 NMEC 感染而经历 GSDMD 依赖性焦亡。通过整合时空单细胞转录组、表观基因组和蛋白质组分析，我们确定 Gbp5 是脑 EC 焦亡的关键调节因子。此外，我们发现 EC 和小胶质细胞 (MG) 中存在稳态到炎症的转变，即焦亡 EC 通过 Angptl4-Sdc4 信号传导促进小胶质细胞焦亡。这种细胞间通讯在中枢神经系统 (CNS) 中的 BBB EC 和小胶质细胞之间建立了“细胞焦亡级联”，提供了对炎症性 BBB 破坏的机制洞察，并揭示了 CNS 免疫微环境中的潜在治疗靶点。

英文题目：The pyroptosis cascade between inflammatory endothelial cells and microglia facilitates BBB disruption in bacterial meningitis.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：引起新生儿脑膜炎的大肠杆菌（NMEC）是新生儿脑膜炎的主要病原体。 NMEC 感染引发的炎症细胞死亡被认为是血脑屏障 (BBB) 破坏和神经炎症的关键决定因素。然而，炎症性血脑屏障破坏和神经炎症环境内炎症传播的机制仍知之甚少。在这里，我们发现脑内皮细胞（EC）响应 NMEC 感染而经历 GSDMD 依赖性焦亡。通过整合时空单细胞转录组、表观基因组和蛋白质组分析，我们确定 Gbp5 是脑 EC 焦亡的关键调节因子。此外，我们发现 EC 和小胶质细胞 (MG) 中存在稳态到炎症的转变，即焦亡 EC 通过 Angptl4-Sdc4 信号传导促进小胶质细胞焦亡。这种细胞间通讯在中枢神经系统 (CNS) 中的 BBB EC 和小胶质细胞之间建立了“细胞焦亡级联”，提供了对炎症性 BBB 破坏的机制洞察，并揭示了 CNS 免疫微环境中的潜在治疗靶点。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

items.title: Bushen Huoxue Acupuncture alleviates alzheimer's disease progression via the E3 ubiquitin ligase SMURF2‑mediated ubiquitination of LAPTM5.
items.authors: Ruomeng Li; Ting Zhang; Dan Ren; Hong Zhu; Jiangxi Xu; Lan Xiao
items.abstract: This study investigated the therapeutic potential and mechanism of Bushen Huoxue Acupuncture (BSHXA) against Alzheimer's disease (AD) using integrated in vivo and in vitro approaches. In eight-month-old SAMP8 mice, BSHXA treatment significantly improved cognitive performance, alleviated hippocampal neuronal damage and neuroinflammation, and downregulated LAPTM5 expression. Complementary in vitro experiments in lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-stimulated BV2 microglia demonstrated that LAPTM5 knockdown reduced apoptosis, pathological protein accumulation, and pro-inflammatory M1 polarization. Through bioinformatic prediction and Co-IP assays, SMURF2 was identified as an E3 ubiquitin ligase directly interacting with LAPTM5 and promoting its ubiquitin-dependent degradation. SMURF2 overexpression in vitro reproduced protective effects similar to LAPTM5 knockdown. Importantly, in vivo knockdown of SMURF2 abolished the therapeutic benefits of BSHXA. Collectively, these findings demonstrate that BSHXA ameliorates AD progression by upregulating SMURF2, which promotes the ubiquitination and subsequent degradation of LAPTM5, thereby suppressing microglial M1 polarization, inhibiting neuroinflammatory responses, and attenuating AD pathologies. The SMURF2-LAPTM5 axis is established as a key mechanistic pathway underlying the neuroprotective effects of BSHXA.
items.title_en: Bushen Huoxue Acupuncture alleviates alzheimer's disease progression via the E3 ubiquitin ligase SMURF2‑mediated ubiquitination of LAPTM5.
items.title_cn: 补肾活血针灸通过 E3 泛素连接酶 SMURF2 介导的 LAPTM5 泛素化来缓解阿尔茨海默病的进展。
items.abstract_cn: 本研究采用体内和体外综合方法，研究了补肾活血针灸 (BSHXA) 对阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的治疗潜力和机制。在 8 个月大的 SAMP8 小鼠中，BSHXA 治疗显着改善了认知能力，减轻了海马神经元损伤和神经炎症，并下调了 LAPTM5 表达。在脂多糖 (LPS) 刺激的 BV2 小胶质细胞中进行的补充体外实验表明，LAPTM5 敲低可减少细胞凋亡、病理性蛋白质积累和促炎性 M1 极化。通过生物信息学预测和 Co-IP 分析，SMURF2 被鉴定为一种 E3 泛素连接酶，可直接与 LAPTM5 相互作用并促进其泛素依赖性降解。 SMURF2 体外过度表达再现了与 LAPTM5 敲低类似的保护作用。重要的是，SMURF2 的体内敲低消除了 BSHXA 的治疗效果。总的来说，这些发现表明 BSHXA 通过上调 SMURF2 改善 AD 进展，SMURF2 促进 LAPTM5 泛素化和随后的降解，从而抑制小胶质细胞 M1 极化，抑制神经炎症反应并减轻 AD 病理。 SMURF2-LAPTM5 轴被确定为 BSHXA 神经保护作用的关键机制途径。

items.title: Harnessing Regulatory T Cells to Modulate Acute Brain Injury: From Mechanisms to Therapy.
items.authors: Junaid Ansari; Sarvin Sasannia; Mykola Matsyuk; Christopher Jackson; Paul Nyquist
items.abstract: Neuroinflammation is a defining feature of acute brain injury such as acute ischemic stroke, traumatic brain injury, intracerebral hemorrhage, and subarachnoid hemorrhage, driven by complex immune interactions within the central nervous system (CNS). Among these, regulatory T cells (Tregs) have emerged as pivotal modulators that counteract the deleterious effects of effector T cell subsets, including Th1 and Th17 cells, which exacerbate blood-brain barrier (BBB) disruption, leukocyte infiltration, and glial activation. In contrast, Tregs exert immunosuppressive and tissue-reparative effects that promote neuroprotection, BBB integrity, and resolution of inflammation. This review examines the mechanistic roles of Tregs in modulating CNS-resident cells such as microglia, astrocytes, and endothelial cells, with emphasis on their capacity to suppress inflammation and support functional recovery. We also highlight emerging therapeutic strategies including low-dose interleukin-2 for selective Treg expansion, exosome-based immunomodulation, and chemokine-directed cell trafficking as promising avenues for clinical intervention. Finally, we discuss translational efforts to harness Tregs in acute neuroinflammatory disease, highlighting their potential as key targets for future therapies.
items.title_en: Harnessing Regulatory T Cells to Modulate Acute Brain Injury: From Mechanisms to Therapy.
items.title_cn: 利用调节性 T 细胞调节急性脑损伤：从机制到治疗。
items.abstract_cn: 神经炎症是急性脑损伤（例如急性缺血性中风、创伤性脑损伤、脑内出血和蛛网膜下腔出血）的一个定义特征，由中枢神经系统（CNS）内复杂的免疫相互作用驱动。其中，调节性 T 细胞 (Treg) 已成为关键调节剂，可以抵消效应 T 细胞亚群（包括 Th1 和 Th17 细胞）的有害影响，这些细胞会加剧血脑屏障 (BBB) 破坏、白细胞浸润和神经胶质活化。相比之下，Treg 发挥免疫抑制和组织修复作用，促进神经保护、血脑屏障完整性和炎症消退。本综述探讨了 Tregs 在调节中枢神经系统驻留细胞（如小胶质细胞、星形胶质细胞和内皮细胞）中的机制作用，重点关注它们抑制炎症和支持功能恢复的能力。我们还强调了新兴的治疗策略，包括用于选择性 Treg 扩增的低剂量 IL-2、基于外泌体的免疫调节和趋化因子引导的细胞运输，作为临床干预的有希望的途径。最后，我们讨论了利用 Tregs 治疗急性神经炎症性疾病的转化努力，强调了它们作为未来治疗关键靶点的潜力。

items.title: Near‑Infrared Photobiomodulation in White‑Matter Disease: From Microglial States to Measurable Endpoints.
items.authors: Jiahao Zhang; Quanguang Zhang; J Dedrick Jordan; Xuemei Zong
items.abstract: White-matter (WM) injury contributes to disability across multiple sclerosis, traumatic brain injury, Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, and small-vessel disease. We use microglial state programs as an organizing axis for WM injury-to-repair logic, while emphasizing that WM outcomes are multicellular and involve oligodendrocyte-lineage cells, astrocytes, axons/neurons, and vascular factors. Microglia span an injury-repair continuum, from inflammatory programs that increase oxidative stress and debris burden to repair-competent programs that support debris handling, remyelination, and axonal integrity. Near-infrared photobiomodulation (PBM; ~800-1100 nm) is most consistently associated with modulation of mitochondrial redox/bioenergetic pathways and inflammatory tone. CCO-centered mechanistic framing is best established near ~ 800-850 nm, whereas longer wavelengths (e.g., ~ 1064-1070 nm) may involve additional initiating mechanisms with downstream convergence on shared redox/bioenergetic and inflammatory pathways. Across demyelination and spinal cord injury models, appropriately dosed PBM has been reported to reduce inflammatory glial readouts and to associate with improved myelin/axon-related endpoints and functional measures, although mechanistic certainty varies across models. Human evidence remains early but broadly supports safety; a randomized trial in moderate traumatic brain injury reported treatment-related changes in diffusion-MRI WM metrics, while small dementia and chronic-injury studies report heterogeneous cognitive and physiological signals. Given dose dependence and depth-limited transcranial delivery, we synthesize mechanism-informed, dose-aware reporting guidance and WM-anchored outcome frameworks that pair diffusion MRI/DTI with interpretable biomarkers (e.g., NfL, GFAP, sTREM2) and thermally controlled sham designs. We also note potential indirect/systemic contributions that could help reconcile depth-dose constraints with deeper WM effects.
items.title_en: Near‑Infrared Photobiomodulation in White‑Matter Disease: From Microglial States to Measurable Endpoints.
items.title_cn: 白质疾病中的近红外光生物调节：从小胶质细胞状态到可测量的终点。
items.abstract_cn: 白质 (WM) 损伤会导致多发性硬化症、创伤性脑损伤、阿尔茨海默病和相关痴呆以及小血管疾病等多种疾病的残疾。我们使用小胶质细胞状态程序作为 WM 损伤修复逻辑的组织轴，同时强调 WM 结果是多细胞的，涉及少突胶质细胞谱系细胞、星形胶质细胞、轴突/神经元和血管因子。小胶质细胞跨越损伤修复连续体，从增加氧化应激和碎片负担的炎症程序到支持碎片处理、髓鞘再生和轴突完整性的修复程序。近红外光生物调节（PBM；~800-1100 nm）与线粒体氧化还原/生物能途径和炎症张力的调节最一致。以 CCO 为中心的机械框架最好在约 800-850 nm 附近建立，而较长的波长（例如，约 1064-1070 nm）可能涉及额外的启动机制，下游会聚在共享的氧化还原/生物能和炎症途径上。在脱髓鞘和脊髓损伤模型中，据报道，适当剂量的 PBM 可以减少炎症神经胶质读数，并与改善髓磷脂/轴突相关终点和功能测量相关，尽管不同模型的机制确定性有所不同。人类证据仍处于早期阶段，但广泛支持安全性；一项针对中度创伤性脑损伤的随机试验报告了扩散 MRI WM 指标与治疗相关的变化，而小型痴呆和慢性损伤研究报告了异质的认知和生理信号。考虑到剂量依赖性和深度限制的经颅输送，我们综合了机制知情、剂量感知的报告指导和 WM 锚定的结果框架，将扩散 MRI/DTI 与可解释的生物标志物（例如 NfL、GFAP、sTREM2）和热控制假设计配对。我们还注意到潜在的间接/系统贡献，有助于协调深度剂量限制与更深层次的 WM 效应。

items.title: Exosome-driven treatments for hair regrowth in androgenetic alopecia: a systematic review of preclinical studies, clinical experiments, safety, and future prospects.
items.authors: Sara Malih; Piao Yang; Saeedeh Zare Jalise; Mohsen Sheykhhasan
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Androgenetic alopecia (AGA) imposes a significant psychosocial burden, yet current treatments such as minoxidil and finasteride often yield suboptimal responses or adverse effects. Exosomes, nanoscale extracellular vesicles derived from mesenchymal stem cells and dermal papilla cells (DPCs), offer a promising regenerative alternative by modulating key hair-growth pathways. This systematic review evaluates the efficacy, mechanisms, and translational challenges of exosome-based therapies for hair restoration in AGA. METHODS: A comprehensive search was conducted across Google Scholar, Embase, PubMed, Scopus, and Web of Science for studies published from 2019 to 2025. The search strategy prioritized AGA-related terminology, including androgenetic alopecia, male pattern hair loss, female pattern hair loss, baldness, exosomes, extracellular vesicles, and hair regrowth. Following duplicate removal, 39 studies meeting Population, Intervention, Comparison, Outcome, and Study design criteria were included for qualitative synthesis. RESULTS: Preclinical data demonstrate that exosomes promote hair regeneration through multiple synergistic mechanisms: activation of the Wnt/beta-catenin and Sonic Hedgehog pathways, suppression of transforming growth factor beta (TGF-beta)/SMAD3 signaling, delivery of anti-inflammatory cytokines (e.g., IL-10), and rejuvenation of senescent DPCs via microRNA cargo (e.g., miR-122-5p). Early clinical studies report improvements in hair density (8-20%) and shaft thickness; however, the evidence base remains limited by small sample sizes, retrospective designs, lack of control groups, and inconsistent outcome measures. Emerging delivery systems, such as thermoresponsive hydrogels and microneedle patches, show promise in enhancing follicular penetration but require further validation. CONCLUSION: Exosome therapy represents a multi-target regenerative approach for AGA with a favorable preliminary safety profile. However, widespread clinical adoption is hindered by critical gaps in manufacturing standardization, scalability, regulatory frameworks, and robust long-term efficacy data. Future research must prioritize large-scale randomized controlled trials with standardized endpoints and Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP)-compliant production protocols to validate these findings and establish exosomes as a mainstream therapeutic option for AGA.
items.title_en: Exosome-driven treatments for hair regrowth in androgenetic alopecia: a systematic review of preclinical studies, clinical experiments, safety, and future prospects.
items.title_cn: 外泌体驱动的雄激素性脱发毛发再生治疗：临床前研究、临床实验、安全性和未来前景的系统评价。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：雄激素性脱发（AGA）会造成严重的社会心理负担，但目前的治疗方法（例如米诺地尔和非那雄胺）通常会产生次优的反应或不良反应。外泌体是一种源自间充质干细胞和真皮乳头细胞 (DPC) 的纳米级细胞外囊泡，通过调节关键的毛发生长途径提供了一种有前景的再生替代方案。本系统综述评估了基于外泌体的 AGA 毛发修复疗法的功效、机制和转化挑战。方法：在 Google Scholar、Embase、PubMed、Scopus 和 Web of Science 上对 2019 年至 2025 年发表的研究进行全面搜索。搜索策略优先考虑 AGA 相关术语，包括雄激素性脱发、男性型脱发、女性型脱发、秃发、外泌体、细胞外囊泡和头发再生。重复删除后，符合人群、干预、比较、结果和研究设计标准的 39 项研究被纳入定性综合。结果：临床前数据表明，外泌体通过多种协同机制促进毛发再生：激活 Wnt/β-连环蛋白和 Sonic Hedgehog 通路、抑制转化生长因子 β (TGF-β)/SMAD3 信号传导、递送抗炎细胞因子（例如 IL-10）以及通过 microRNA 货物（例如 miR-122-5p）使衰老的 DPC 恢复活力。早期临床研究报告头发密度 (8-20%) 和干粗度有所改善；然而，证据基础仍然受到样本量小、回顾性设计、缺乏对照组和结果测量不一致等因素的限制。新兴的输送系统，例如热响应水凝胶和微针贴片，在增强毛囊渗透方面显示出希望，但需要进一步验证。结论：外泌体疗法代表了 AGA 的多靶点再生方法，具有良好的初步安全性。然而，广泛的临床应用受到制造标准化、可扩展性、监管框架和稳健的长期疗效数据方面的关键差距的阻碍。未来的研究必须优先考虑大规模随机研究……

items.title: Blood cytotoxic natural killer-like CD8 + CD94+ T cells migrate to the brain and predict multiple sclerosis severity.
items.authors: Emilie Dugast; Sita Shah; Isabel Vogel; Amandine Loret; Céline Monvoisin; Alexandra Garcia; Cynthia Fourgeux; Victor Gourain
items.abstract: Memory CD8+ T cells are central to multiple sclerosis (MS) and undergo clonal expansion, but disease-associated states remain incompletely defined. By single-cell profiling of circulating memory CD8+ T cells from patients with relapsing-remitting MS, healthy volunteers, and neuroinflammatory controls, we identified an MS-associated cytotoxic subset with NK-like features. These cells increase around relapse activity and belong to an oligoclonal reservoir. In an independent cohort sampled at the first clinical event, an elevated frequency of NK-like CD8+ T cells predicted an aggressive MS course two years later and was associated with a migratory/inflammatory program. Bulk and single-cell RNA-seq confirmed the NK-like transcriptional signature, and functional assays demonstrated TCR-independent cytotoxicity. Immunostaining and spatial transcriptomics revealed enrichment of these cells in MS lesions and a spatial association with macrophages/microglia. Together, our results identify a cytotoxic NK-like CD8+ T-cell subset that links peripheral inflammation to CNS lesions and may serve as an early biomarker of MS severity.
items.title_en: Blood cytotoxic natural killer-like CD8 + CD94+ T cells migrate to the brain and predict multiple sclerosis severity.
items.title_cn: 血细胞毒性自然杀伤样 CD8 + CD94+ T 细胞迁移到大脑并预测多发性硬化症的严重程度。
items.abstract_cn: 记忆 CD8+ T 细胞是多发性硬化症 (MS) 的核心并经历克隆扩增，但与疾病相关的状态仍未完全确定。通过对来自复发缓解型多发性硬化症患者、健康志愿者和神经炎症对照者的循环记忆 CD8+ T 细胞进行单细胞分析，我们鉴定出了具有 NK 样特征的与多发性硬化症相关的细胞毒性亚群。这些细胞在复发活动周围增加，属于寡克隆储存库。在第一次临床事件中采样的独立队列中，NK 样 CD8+ T 细胞频率升高预示着两年后的侵袭性多发性硬化症病程，并且与迁移/炎症程序相关。批量和单细胞 RNA-seq 证实了 NK 样转录特征，功能测定证明了不依赖于 TCR 的细胞毒性。免疫染色和空间转录组学揭示了这些细胞在多发性硬化症病变中的富集以及与巨噬细胞/小胶质细胞的空间关联。总之，我们的结果确定了一种细胞毒性 NK 样 CD8+ T 细胞亚群，该亚群将周围炎症与 CNS 病变联系起来，并可能作为 MS 严重程度的早期生物标志物。

英文题目：Blood cytotoxic natural killer-like CD8 + CD94+ T cells migrate to the brain and predict multiple sclerosis severity.

研究背景：该研究与神经外科、脑损伤、脑积水或神经炎症相关，可能为课题设计和综述选题提供线索。

核心发现：记忆 CD8+ T 细胞是多发性硬化症 (MS) 的核心并经历克隆扩增，但与疾病相关的状态仍未完全确定。通过对来自复发缓解型多发性硬化症患者、健康志愿者和神经炎症对照者的循环记忆 CD8+ T 细胞进行单细胞分析，我们鉴定出了具有 NK 样特征的与多发性硬化症相关的细胞毒性亚群。这些细胞在复发活动周围增加，属于寡克隆储存库。在第一次临床事件中采样的独立队列中，NK 样 CD8+ T 细胞频率升高预示着两年后的侵袭性多发性硬化症病程，并且与迁移/炎症程序相关。批量和单细胞 RNA-seq 证实了 NK 样转录特征，功能测定证明了不依赖于 TCR 的细胞毒性。免疫染色和空间转录组学揭示了这些细胞在多发性硬化症病变中的富集以及与巨噬细胞/小胶质细胞的空间关联。总之，我们的结果确定了一种细胞毒性 NK 样 CD8+ T 细胞亚群，该亚群将周围炎症与 CNS 病变联系起来，并可能作为 MS 严重程度的早期生物标志物。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

items.title: BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p promotes macrophage M2 polarization and osteogenesis in postmenopausal osteoporosis through regulating Rspo2/Wnt/β-catenin signaling.
items.authors: Yingwei Zhao; Jingsong Liu; Yubo Zhang; Min Liang; Rui Li; Yansong Wang
items.abstract: This study aimed to investigate the effects of bone marrow mesenchymal stem cell-derived exosomes (BMSCs-EXOs) on postmenopausal osteoporosis (PMOP). Bilateral ovariectomy (OVX) surgery was performed to establish mouse PMOP models. Histological analysis was conducted using hematoxylin and eosin staining. Gene expression was detected using immunohistochemistry and Western blot. miRNA and mRNA were detected using quantitative reverse transcriptase PCR. Cell functions were analyzed using oil red O, alizarin red, and alkaline phosphatase (ALP) staining, and flow cytometry. The interaction between miR-196a-5p and R-spondin 2 (Rspo2) was verified by luciferase and RNA immunoprecipitation assays. We found that BMSCs-EXOs promoted osteogenesis and macrophage M2 polarization. BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p enhanced the effects of BMSCs-EXOs on mediating osteogenesis and M2 polarization. Mechanistically, miR-196a-5p targeted Rspo2, activating Wnt/β-Catenin signaling. BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p alleviated the effects of M1 macrophages and promoted the osteogenesis of BMSCs, which was reversed by Rspo2. Furthermore, BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p promoted the osteogenesis in vivo. However, miR-196a-5p inhibitor exerted the opposite effects, which was reversed by recombinant IL-10. Taken together, BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p protects against PMOP by driving macrophage M2 polarization though regulating Rspo2/Wnt/β-Catenin signaling. Therefore, targeting cell-cell communication in the microenvironment of bone lesions may be a promising strategy for PMOP.
items.title_en: BMSCs-derived exosomal miR-196a-5p promotes macrophage M2 polarization and osteogenesis in postmenopausal osteoporosis through regulating Rspo2/Wnt/β-catenin signaling.
items.title_cn: BMSC 衍生的外泌体 miR-196a-5p 通过调节 Rspo2/Wnt/β-catenin 信号传导促进绝经后骨质疏松症中巨噬细胞 M2 极化和成骨。
items.abstract_cn: 本研究旨在探讨骨髓间充质干细胞源性外泌体（BMSCs-EXOs）对绝经后骨质疏松症（PMOP）的影响。进行双侧卵巢切除术（OVX）手术建立小鼠 PMOP 模型。使用苏木精和伊红染色进行组织学分析。使用免疫组织化学和蛋白质印迹检测基因表达。使用定量逆转录酶 PCR 检测 miRNA 和 mRNA。使用油红 O、茜素红和碱性磷酸酶 (ALP) 染色以及流式细胞术分析细胞功能。通过荧光素酶和 RNA 免疫沉淀测定验证了 miR-196a-5p 和 R-spondin 2 (Rspo2) 之间的相互作用。我们发现 BMSCs-EXO 促进成骨和巨噬细胞 M2 极化。 BMSCs 衍生的外泌体 miR-196a-5p 增强了 BMSCs-EXOs 对介导成骨和 M2 极化的作用。从机制上讲，miR-196a-5p 靶向 Rspo2，激活 Wnt/β-Catenin 信号传导。 BMSCs 来源的外泌体 miR-196a-5p 减轻了 M1 巨噬细胞的影响并促进 BMSCs 的成骨，而 Rspo2 可逆转这一作用。此外，BMSCs 衍生的外泌体 miR-196a-5p 促进体内成骨。然而，miR-196a-5p抑制剂发挥了相反的作用，重组IL-10可以逆转这种作用。综上所述，BMSC 衍生的外泌体 miR-196a-5p 通过调节 Rspo2/Wnt/β-Catenin 信号传导驱动巨噬细胞 M2 极化来预防 PMOP。因此，针对骨病变微环境中的细胞间通讯可能是 PMOP 的一个有前途的策略。

items.title: Dysregulation of the TFEB-ATP6V0C axis in microglia exacerbates α-synuclein pathology through impaired lysosomal acidification in Parkinson's disease.
items.authors: Yiming Wang; Zhuoran Ma; Zongjie Jin; Liang Kou; Nian Xiong; Tao Wang; Yun Xia
items.abstract: Emerging evidence suggests that microglia exhibit dual regulatory roles in the pathogenesis of Parkinson's disease (PD); however, their precise function in α-synuclein clearance remains incompletely understood. Here, we provide compelling evidence that α-synuclein preformed fibrils (α-syn PFF) impair lysosomal acidification in microglia, leading to defective autophagic flux and disrupted α-syn degradation. This dysfunction further promotes the secretion of microglial extracellular vesicles (EVs), exacerbating disease pathology. Mechanistic investigations uncover that α-syn PFF directly interacts with ATP6V0C, a pivotal V0 subunit of V-ATPase. This interaction sterically hinders V0-V1 domain assembly, disrupting proton pump complex formation and reducing ATP6V0C expression. Functionally, ATP6V0C overexpression rescues lysosomal acidification deficits and facilitates α-syn degradation in vitro, while in vivo, ATP6V0C overexpression alleviates neurotoxicity and reduces phosphorylated α-syn aggregation in α-syn PFF mouse models. Further investigation identifies the PI3K-AKT-mTOR-TFEB pathway as a key regulatory axis of ATP6V0C-mediated lysosomal acidification in microglia. Notably, both TFEB activation and mTOR inhibition restore lysosomal acidity and upregulate ATP6V0C expression, thereby enhancing α-syn clearance. These findings establish the TFEB-ATP6V0C axis as a key determinant of microglial proteostasis, proposing targeted activation of this pathway as a promising strategy to mitigate PD progression.
items.title_en: Dysregulation of the TFEB-ATP6V0C axis in microglia exacerbates α-synuclein pathology through impaired lysosomal acidification in Parkinson's disease.
items.title_cn: 小胶质细胞中 TFEB-ATP6V0C 轴的失调通过帕金森病中溶酶体酸化受损而加剧 α-突触核蛋白病理。
items.abstract_cn: 新的证据表明，小胶质细胞在帕金森病（PD）的发病机制中表现出双重调节作用；然而，它们在 α-突触核蛋白清除中的精确功能仍不完全清楚。在这里，我们提供了令人信服的证据，证明 α-突触核蛋白预形成原纤维 (α-syn PFF) 会损害小胶质细胞中的溶酶体酸化，导致自噬通量缺陷和 α-syn 降解中断。这种功能障碍进一步促进小胶质细胞外囊泡（EV）的分泌，加剧疾病病理。机理研究发现 α-syn PFF 直接与 ATP6V0C（V-ATPase 的关键 V0 亚基）相互作用。这种相互作用在空间上阻碍 V0-V1 结构域组装，破坏质子泵复合物的形成并减少 ATP6V0C 表达。从功能上讲，ATP6V0C 过表达可在体外挽救溶酶体酸化缺陷并促进 α-syn 降解，而在体内，ATP6V0C 过表达可减轻 α-syn PFF 小鼠模型中的神经毒性并减少磷酸化 α-syn 聚集。进一步的研究确定 PI3K-AKT-mTOR-TFEB 通路是小胶质细胞中 ATP6V0C 介导的溶酶体酸化的关键调节轴。值得注意的是，TFEB 激活和 mTOR 抑制均可恢复溶酶体酸度并上调 ATP6V0C 表达，从而增强 α-syn 清除。这些发现将 TFEB-ATP6V0C 轴确定为小胶质细胞蛋白稳态的关键决定因素，提出靶向激活该通路作为减缓 PD 进展的有希望的策略。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Blood cytotoxic natural killer-like CD8 + CD94+ T cells migrate to the brain and predict multiple sclerosis severity.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Emilie Dugast; Sita Shah; Isabel Vogel; Amandine Loret; Céline Monvoisin; Alexandra Garcia; Cynthia Fourgeux; Victor Gourain
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Memory CD8+ T cells are central to multiple sclerosis (MS) and undergo clonal expansion, but disease-associated states remain incompletely defined. By single-cell profiling of circulating memory CD8+ T cells from patients with relapsing-remitting MS, healthy volunteers, and neuroinflammatory controls, we identified an MS-associated cytotoxic subset with NK-like features. These cells increase around relapse activity and belong to an oligoclonal reservoir. In an independent cohort sampled at the first clinical event, an elevated frequency of NK-like CD8+ T cells predicted an aggressive MS course two years later and was associated with a migratory/inflammatory program. Bulk and single-cell RNA-seq confirmed the NK-like transcriptional signature, and functional assays demonstrated TCR-independent cytotoxicity. Immunostaining and spatial transcriptomics revealed enrichment of these cells in MS lesions and a spatial association with macrophages/microglia. Together, our results identify a cytotoxic NK-like CD8+ T-cell subset that links peripheral inflammation to CNS lesions and may serve as an early biomarker of MS severity.

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Prior Traumatic Brain Injury and Alzheimer Disease Blood Biomarkers.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Yael Rosen-Lang; Agathe Vrillon; Shlomit Pasternak; Ganna Blazhenets; David N Soleimani-Meigooni; Gil D Rabinovici; Michael W Weiner; Nathan Hantke
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Traumatic brain injury (TBI) is a risk factor for dementia and is known to impact levels of several Alzheimer disease (AD) blood biomarkers. The plasma phosphorylated tau 217 (p-tau217)/amyloid-β 42 (Aβ42) ratio has been reported to be 90% accurate for the detection of brain amyloid in civilian cohorts. OBJECTIVE: To evaluate the accuracy of emerging AD blood biomarkers in veterans with and without a TBI history. DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This cross-sectional cohort study of a diagnostic test assessed the performance of the US Food and Drug Administration-approved plasma p-tau217/Aβ42 ratio and plasma levels of p-tau217 and Aβ42/40 ratio for detecting brain Aβ positivity (eg, amyloid-positron emission tomography [PET] consensus visual read). The accuracy of biomarkers was compared in veterans without TBI, those with TBI with loss of consciousness (LOC) for 0 to 5 minutes, and those with TBI with LOC for greater than 5 minutes. Existing data and banked plasma from the Alzheimer Disease Neuroimaging Initiative Department of Defense (ADNI-DOD) study were used. Years of enrollment were 2013 to 2020. Included in this study were Vietnam War veterans without dementia (cognitively unimpaired and those with mild cognitive impairment) who had amyloid-PET and concurrently collected banked plasma available for analysis. Plasma biomarker analysis took place from 2024 to 2025, and data analysis was performed from July 2025 to February 2026. EXPOSURES: AD blood biomarkers and TBI history. MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: p-Tau217/Aβ42 accuracy in the detection of amyloid-PET consensus visual read positivity across groups with/without TBI exposure. RESULTS: In 272 participants, mean (SD) age was 70 (4.5) years, 270 were male (99.3%), and 83 (30.5%) were amyloid-PET positive. The plasma p-tau217/Aβ42 ratio was highly accurate in veterans with no TBI (90%; 95% CI, 84%-96%) but not in veterans with TBI with LOC for 0 to 5 minutes (78% accuracy; 95% CI, 69%-87%; P = .03 vs no TBI), nor in veterans with TBI with LOC greater than 5 minutes (63% accuracy; 95% CI, 53%-73%; P < .001 vs no TBI). Results were similar for plasma p-tau217 alone and plasma Aβ42/40 ratio. Results were also similar after excluding veterans with TBI within the past 10 years or when amyloid-PET positivity was defined using a quantitative threshold rather than consensus visual read. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: Results of this cross-sectional cohort study of a diagnostic test suggest that among individuals who are cognitively unimpaired or have mild cognitive impairment and a TBI history, the p-tau217/Aβ42 ratio test may miss over half of amyloid-PET-positive cases. Caution is advised in interpreting AD blood test results in this context.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Prior Traumatic Brain Injury and Alzheimer Disease Blood Biomarkers.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 既往创伤性脑损伤和阿尔茨海默病血液生物标志物。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：创伤性脑损伤 (TBI) 是痴呆症的危险因素，并且已知会影响多种阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 血液生物标志物的水平。据报道，血浆磷酸化 tau 217 (p-tau217)/淀粉样蛋白-β 42 (Aβ42) 比率对于检测平民群体中的脑淀粉样蛋白的准确度为 90%。目的：评估有或没有 TBI 病史的退伍军人中新出现的 AD 血液生物标志物的准确性。设计、设置和参与者：这项诊断测试的横断面队列研究评估了美国食品和药物管理局批准的血浆 p-tau217/Aβ42 比率以及血浆 p-tau217 水平和 Aβ42/40 比率的性能，用于检测大脑 Aβ 阳性（例如，淀粉样蛋白正电子发射断层扫描 [PET] 共识视觉读数）。比较了没有 TBI 的退伍军人、患有 TBI 且意识丧失 (LOC) 0 至 5 分钟的退伍军人以及患有 TBI 且意识丧失 (LOC) 超过 5 分钟的退伍军人的生物标记物的准确性。使用了国防部阿尔茨海默病神经影像计划 (ADNI-DOD) 研究的现有数据和储存的血浆。入组年份为 2013 年至 2020 年。本研究包括没有痴呆症的越战退伍军人（认知未受损和轻度认知受损），他们进行了淀粉样蛋白 PET 检测，同时收集了库存血浆用于分析。血浆生物标志物分析于 2024 年至 2025 年进行，数据分析于 2025 年 7 月至 2026 年 2 月进行。暴露：AD 血液生物标志物和 TBI 病史。主要结果和测量：p-Tau217/Aβ42 在有/没有 TBI 暴露的组中检测淀粉样蛋白-PET 一致视觉读取阳性的准确性。结果：272 名参与者的平均 (SD) 年龄为 70 (4.5) 岁，其中 270 名参与者为男性 (99.3%)，83 名参与者 (30.5%) 为淀粉样蛋白 PET 阳性。血浆 p-tau217/Aβ42 比值在没有 TBI 的退伍军人中非常准确（90%；95% CI，84%-96%），但在患有 TBI 且 LOC 0 至 5 分钟的退伍军人中则不然（78% 准确度；95% CI，69%-87%；P = 0.03 与无 TBI），也不在患有 TBI 且 LOC 超过 5 分钟的退伍军人中（63% 准确度；50% 准确度；95% CI，69%-87%；P = .03 与无 TBI）。 95% CI，53%-73%；P < .001 与无 TBI 相比）。单独血浆 p-tau217 和血浆 Aβ42/40 比率的结果相似。结果……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Donor-specific pathological features associate with genetic background, lesion type distribution, and clinical heterogeneity in multiple sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Lukas Lütje; J Q Alida Chen; Jörg Hamann; Joost Smolders; Inge Huitinga; Aletta M R van den Bosch
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Multiple sclerosis (MS) shows pronounced pathological and clinical variability between individuals, reflecting differences in genetic susceptibility, inflammatory activity, and tissue repair. This variability complicates efforts to relate lesion pathology to clinical trajectories. In previous work in the Netherlands Brain Bank MS autopsy cohort (NBB-MS), we showed that relative proportions of different lesion types, lesion load, and microglia/macrophage activity score, associate with clinical severity, while also revealing marked inter-individual variability. Here, we extend these observations by examining whether selected donor-specific pathological features relate to genetic background, quantitative lesion type distributions, and clinical disease course, and thereby help contextualize this heterogeneity.Brain tissue from 287 NBB-MS donors was assessed for the presence of the donor-specific pathological features, namely perivascular cuffs, microglial nodules, broad rim lesions (BRLs), and remyelination efficiency. Perivascular cuffs and microglial nodules were more prevalent among carriers of the MS susceptibility allele HLA-DRB1*15:01 (rs3135388). BRLs and perivascular cuffs were enriched in carriers of the MS severity-associated SNP in the DYSF-ZNF638 locus (rs10191329). Perivascular cuffs associated with increased microglia/macrophage activation score and decreased age at death. Microglial nodules in the normal appearing white matter associated with a higher proportion of active lesions. BRLs were linked to increased proportions of active and mixed active/inactive lesions, higher brainstem lesion rate, and a higher age related MS severity score. Poor remyelination efficiency associated with a higher proportion of mixed active/inactive and inactive lesions, and a shorter disease duration.Together, these findings show that specific pathological features of donors relate to genetic risk, lesion type distribution, and clinical outcome. Integrating these donor-specific pathological features alongside lesion classification will enable a more biologically refined interpretation of post-mortem MS tissue study results and will improve understanding of inter-individual heterogeneity in MS.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Donor-specific pathological features associate with genetic background, lesion type distribution, and clinical heterogeneity in multiple sclerosis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 供体特异性病理特征与多发性硬化症的遗传背景、病变类型分布和临床异质性相关。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 多发性硬化症（MS）在个体之间表现出明显的病理和临床变异，反映了遗传易感性、炎症活动和组织修复的差异。这种变异性使得将病变病理学与临床轨迹联系起来的努力变得复杂。在荷兰脑库 MS 尸检队列 (NBB-MS) 的先前工作中，我们表明不同病变类型、病变负荷和小胶质细胞/巨噬细胞活动评分的相对比例与临床严重程度相关，同时也揭示了显着的个体间差异。在这里，我们通过检查选定的供体特异性病理特征是否与遗传背景、定量病变类型分布和临床病程相关来扩展这些观察结果，从而帮助了解这种异质性。对 287 名 NBB-MS 供体的脑组织进行了评估，以确定是否存在供体特异性病理特征，即血管周围袖口、小胶质细胞结节、宽缘病变 (BRL) 和髓鞘再生效率。 MS 易感性等位基因 HLA-DRB1*15:01 (rs3135388) 携带者中，血管周围袖带和小胶质细胞结节更为常见。 BRL 和血管周围袖带在 DYSF-ZNF638 位点 (rs10191329) 中与 MS 严重程度相关的 SNP 携带者中富集。血管周围袖带与小胶质细胞/巨噬细胞活化评分增加和死亡年龄降低相关。正常白质中的小胶质结节与较高比例的活动性病变相关。 BRL 与活动性和混合性活动/非活动性病变的比例增加、脑干病变率较高以及年龄相关的 MS 严重程度评分较高有关。髓鞘再生效率差与混合活动/非活动和非活动病变比例较高以及病程较短有关。总而言之，这些研究结果表明，供体的特定病理特征与遗传风险、病变类型分布和临床结果有关。将这些供体特异性病理特征与病变分类相结合，将能够对死后多发性硬化症组织研究结果进行更加生物学精细的解释，并将增进对个体间的理解……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: The mitochondrial unfolded protein response in human microglia disrupts neuronal-glial communication and promotes senescence.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Maria Jose Perez J; Alicia Lam; Christin Weissleder; Federico Bertoli; Hariam Raji; Mariella Bosch; Ivan Nemazanyy; Stefanie Kalb
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Mitochondria have evolved a specialized mitochondrial unfolded protein response (UPRmt) to maintain proteostasis and promote recovery under stress. Studies in simple organisms have shown that UPRmt activation in glial cells supports proteostasis through beneficial non-cell-autonomous communication with neurons. However, the role of mitochondrial stress responses in the human brain remains unclear. To address this gap, we investigated the cell-type-specific effects of mitochondrial proteotoxic stress using human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neuronal and glial cultures, as well as brain organoids. Here we show that mitochondrial proteotoxic stress induces metabolic rewiring in human microglia, marked by depletion of S-adenosylmethionine and lipid remodeling, ultimately leading to a senescent phenotype. Using human neuronal-glial tricultures and microglia-containing brain organoids, we identified the specific contributions of microglia to brain senescence and mitochondrial stress-driven neurodegenerative processes. UPRmt activation disrupts microglial communication with neighboring cells, triggering inflammatory signaling and impairing proteostasis. Together, these findings reveal how impaired mitochondrial proteostasis alters intercellular networks and identify a critical role for the UPRmt in neurodegenerative disease pathogenesis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: The mitochondrial unfolded protein response in human microglia disrupts neuronal-glial communication and promotes senescence.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 人类小胶质细胞中的线粒体未折叠蛋白反应会破坏神经元-胶质细胞的通讯并促进衰老。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 线粒体已经进化出一种特殊的线粒体未折叠蛋白反应（UPRmt）来维持蛋白质稳态并促进压力下的恢复。对简单生物体的研究表明，神经胶质细胞中的 UPRmt 激活通过与神经元的有益非细胞自主通讯来支持蛋白质稳态。然而，线粒体应激反应在人脑中的作用仍不清楚。为了解决这一差距，我们使用人类诱导多能干细胞来源的神经元和神经胶质培养物以及脑类器官研究了线粒体蛋白毒性应激对细胞类型特异性的影响。在这里，我们发现线粒体蛋白毒性应激会诱导人类小胶质细胞的代谢重新布线，其特征是 S-腺苷甲硫氨酸的消耗和脂质重塑，最终导致衰老表型。使用人类神经元-胶质细胞三培养物和含有小胶质细胞的脑类器官，我们确定了小胶质细胞对大脑衰老和线粒体应激驱动的神经退行性过程的具体贡献。 UPRmt 激活会破坏小胶质细胞与邻近细胞的通讯，引发炎症信号传导并损害蛋白质稳态。总之，这些发现揭示了受损的线粒体蛋白质稳态如何改变细胞间网络，并确定了 UPRmt 在神经退行性疾病发病机制中的关键作用。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Arc mediates intercellular tau transmission via extracellular vesicles.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Mitali Tyagi; Eric de Hoog; Matthew Grega; Kaelan R Sullivan; Alicia C Walker; Radhika Chadha; Ava Northrop; Balázs Fábián
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Tau pathology spreads cell to cell, but the mechanisms of intercellular tau transmission remain unclear. We find that the neuronal gene Arc is critical for the release of tau in neuronal extracellular vesicles (EVs) via a direct protein-protein interaction. Brain EVs purified from transgenic rTg4510 mutant tau mice (rTgWT) crossed with Arc knockout mice (rTgArc KO) contain less tau and reduced tau seeding potential. Both Arc and tau are co-packaged in mouse and human brain-derived EVs. Moreover, Arc levels in brain-derived EVs isolated from human Alzheimer's disease (AD) brains show a strong positive correlation with phosphorylated EV-tau levels. rTgArc KO mice have increased accumulation of intracellular tau and a modest increase in cell toxicity early in disease progression. Strikingly, intercellular tau transmission is almost absent in Arc KO mice. These results show that Arc is critical for the packaging of tau in EVs, which plays a significant role in intercellular tau transmission.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Arc mediates intercellular tau transmission via extracellular vesicles.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: Arc 通过细胞外囊泡介导细胞间 tau 蛋白传输。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: Tau 病理学在细胞间传播，但细胞间 tau 传播的机制仍不清楚。我们发现神经元基因 Arc 对于通过直接的蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用在神经元细胞外囊泡 (EV) 中释放 tau 蛋白至关重要。从与 Arc 敲除小鼠 (rTgArc KO) 杂交的转基因 rTg4510 突变 tau 小鼠 (rTgWT) 中纯化的脑 EV 含有较少的 tau 并降低了 tau 播种潜力。 Arc 和 tau 都共同封装在小鼠和人脑衍生的 EV 中。此外，从人类阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 大脑中分离出的脑源性 EV 中的 Arc 水平与磷酸化 EV-tau 水平呈强正相关。 rTgArc KO 小鼠在疾病进展早期细胞内 tau 蛋白积累增加，细胞毒性适度增加。引人注目的是，Arc KO 小鼠中几乎不存在细胞间 tau 蛋白传递。这些结果表明，Arc 对于电动汽车中 tau 蛋白的包装至关重要，在细胞间 tau 蛋白传输中发挥着重要作用。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-cell multiomics of neuron activation reveals context-specific genetics of brain disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Lifan Liang; Siwei Zhang; Zicheng Wang; Hanwen Zhang; Chuxuan Li; Christina Thapa; Emily K Oh; David Sirkin
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Most causal variants for neuropsychiatric disorders (NPD) remain unknown. A major hurdle is that disease variants may act in specific contexts, such as during neuronal activation, which is difficult to study in vivo at the population level. We profiled single-nucleus neuron-activation multiomics in human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neurons from 100 donors, revealing the NPD-relevant transcriptomic and epigenomic landscape of neuronal activation. We identified abundant genetic variants associated with activity-dependent gene expression and chromatin accessibility, the latter explaining larger proportions of NPD heritability. Integrating multiomics data with genome-wide association studies further revealed NPD risk variants and genes with effects detected only upon stimulation, such as activity-dependent cholesterol metabolism. Our work highlights the power of cell stimulation to reveal context-specific "hidden" genetic effects.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-cell multiomics of neuron activation reveals context-specific genetics of brain disorders.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 神经元激活的单细胞多组学揭示了大脑疾病的背景特异性遗传学。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 神经精神疾病 (NPD) 的大多数致病变异仍然未知。一个主要障碍是疾病变异可能在特定情况下起作用，例如在神经元激活期间，这很难在群体水平上进行体内研究。我们对来自 100 个供体的人类诱导多能干细胞衍生神经元的单核神经元激活多组学进行了分析，揭示了神经元激活的 NPD 相关转录组和表观基因组景观。我们发现了与活性依赖性基因表达和染色质可及性相关的丰富遗传变异，后者解释了较大比例的 NPD 遗传力。将多组学数据与全基因组关联研究相结合，进一步揭示了 NPD 风险变异和仅在刺激时才检测到影响的基因，例如活动依赖性胆固醇代谢。我们的工作强调了细胞刺激揭示特定环境“隐藏”遗传效应的力量。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Noninvasive decoding of typed sentences from human brain activity.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Jarod Lévy; Mingfang Zhang; Svetlana Pinet; Jérémy Rapin; Hubert Banville; Stéphane d'Ascoli; Jean-Rémi King
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Modern neuroprostheses can now restore communication in patients who have lost the ability to speak or move. However, implanting these invasive devices comes with risks inherent to neurosurgery. Here we introduce a noninvasive method to decode the production of sentences from brain activity and demonstrate its efficacy in a cohort of 35 healthy volunteers. For this, we present Brain2Qwerty, a new deep learning architecture trained to decode sentences from either electro- or magnetoencephalography, while participants typed briefly memorized sentences on a QWERTY keyboard. With magnetoencephalography, Brain2Qwerty reaches, on average, a character error rate of 29% and substantially outperforms electroencephalography (character error rate: 65%). For the best participants, the model achieves a character error rate of 18%, and can perfectly decode a variety of sentences outside of the training set. Overall, these results narrow the gap between invasive and noninvasive methods and thus open the path for developing safe brain-computer interfaces for noncommunicating patients.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Noninvasive decoding of typed sentences from human brain activity.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 对人脑活动中输入的句子进行无创解码。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 现代神经假体现在可以帮助失去说话或移动能力的患者恢复沟通。然而，植入这些侵入性设备会带来神经外科固有的风险。在这里，我们介绍了一种非侵入性方法来解码大脑活动中句子的产生，并在 35 名健康志愿者的队列中证明了其功效。为此，我们提出了 Brain2Qwerty，这是一种新的深度学习架构，经过训练可以解码来自脑电图或脑磁图的句子，同时参与者在 QWERTY 键盘上输入简短记忆的句子。借助脑磁图，Brain2Qwerty 的平均字符错误率为 29%，大大优于脑电图（字符错误率：65%）。对于最好的参与者，该模型实现了 18% 的字符错误率，并且可以完美解码训练集之外的各种句子。总的来说，这些结果缩小了侵入性和非侵入性方法之间的差距，从而为非沟通患者开发安全的脑机接口开辟了道路。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Gut microbiome is associated with recurrence-free survival in patients with resected high-risk melanoma receiving adjuvant immune checkpoint blockade.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Mykhaylo Usyk; Richard B Hayes; Rob Knight; Antonio Gonzalez; Huilin Li; Iman Osman; Jeffrey S Weber; Jiyoung Ahn
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Patients with resected, high-risk melanoma receive adjuvant immune checkpoint blockade (ICB), yet clinical benefit remains unpredictable, with 25%-40% of patients experiencing recurrence. To evaluate whether pre-treatment gut microbiome (GMB) features predict recurrence, we analyzed stool samples from 674 patients enrolled in a phase 3 clinical trial, CheckMate 915, which investigated the combination of nivolumab plus ipilimumab versus nivolumab as a single agent across five geographic regions. Region-specific and cross-region meta-analyses identified pre-treatment taxa associated with recurrence, including Eubacterium, Ruminococcus, Firmicutes, and Clostridium. Recurrence prediction was strongest when the validation cohort exhibited GMB profiles similar to those in the discovery cohort. Among closely matched individuals (Jensen-Shannon divergence [JSD] ≤ 0.11), the area under the curve (AUC) for recurrence prediction ranged from 0.78 to 0.94 across regions. GMB composition remained largely stable following treatment. These findings suggest that gut bacterial markers can predict recurrence after adjuvant ICB treatment in melanoma, supporting their potential as clinically actionable biomarkers to guide personalized therapy.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Gut microbiome is associated with recurrence-free survival in patients with resected high-risk melanoma receiving adjuvant immune checkpoint blockade.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 肠道微生物群与接受辅助免疫检查点阻断的高危黑色素瘤切除患者的无复发生存相关。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 切除的高危黑色素瘤患者接受辅助免疫检查点阻断 (ICB)，但临床获益仍不可预测，25%-40% 的患者会出现复发。为了评估治疗前肠道微生物组 (GMB) 特征是否可以预测复发，我们分析了参加 3 期临床试验 CheckMate 915 的 674 名患者的粪便样本，该试验在五个地理区域研究了纳武单抗加伊匹单抗的组合与纳武单抗作为单药的情况。区域特异性和跨区域荟萃分析确定了与复发相关的治疗前分类群，包括真杆菌、瘤胃球菌、厚壁菌门和梭状芽胞杆菌。当验证队列表现出与发现队列相似的 GMB 配置文件时，复发预测最强。在密切匹配的个体中（Jensen-Shannon 散度 [JSD] ≤ 0.11），各区域复发预测的曲线下面积 (AUC) 范围为 0.78 至 0.94。治疗后 GMB 成分基本保持稳定。这些发现表明，肠道细菌标记物可以预测黑色素瘤辅助 ICB 治疗后的复发，支持它们作为临床上可行的生物标记物来指导个性化治疗的潜力。

global_hot_topics.title: Serum trace metals across environmental-pressure strata in Campania, Italy (SPES): a population-based cross-sectional biomonitoring study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Pellegrino Cerino; Antonio Pizzolante; Carlo Buonerba; Paolo Montuori
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND AND OBJECTIVES: We characterized fine-scale geographic variation in serum trace metals across Campania (southern Italy). MATERIALS AND METHODS: In 2016-2017, the SPES programme sampled residents aged 20-49 years from municipal registries across Campania. Municipalities were stratified using an environmental-pressure index into three broad impact strata: high-impact, medium-impact and low-impact. For higher spatial resolution, municipalities were also grouped into 21 predefined municipal clusters. We measured 20 serum trace metals by ICP-MS and estimated age- and sex-adjusted geometric mean ratios (GMRs) comparing each stratum or cluster with the study-wide geometric mean. RESULTS: Of 4205 enrolled participants, 4188 were included. Medium-impact areas showed higher mercury (GMR 1.87, 95% CI 1.73-2.02) and antimony (1.95, 1.71-2.23) relative to the cohort average. At the municipal-cluster scale, the Irno Valley clusters around the Fonderie Pisano foundry (Baronissi-Pellezzano and Salerno) had about six-fold higher mercury (GMR 5.71 and 6.10) and about three-fold higher antimony (3.45 and 2.93), whereas the Valle del Sabato cluster showed about ten-fold higher antimony (GMR 10.5) and about seven-fold higher nickel (7.16) and cadmium (7.67). CONCLUSIONS: Overall serum metal concentrations were broadly comparable with European general-population ranges, but pronounced small-area heterogeneity indicates localized hotspots that provincial or regional averages can obscure. This population-based human biomonitoring study analyzed serum concentrations of 20 trace metals in 4,188 adults from Campania, Italy, comparing high-, medium- and low-impact environmental-pressure areas and 21 municipal clusters.Although overall serum metal concentrations were broadly comparable with European general-population ranges, the analysis identified pronounced small-area heterogeneity that would be obscured by broader provincial or regional summaries.Medium-impact areas showed higher mercury and antimony relative to the cohort average, while cluster-level analyses identified localized hotspots not captured by broad area-level summaries.The Irno Valley clusters around the Fonderie Pisano foundry showed about six-fold higher mercury and about three-fold higher antimony, whereas the Valle del Sabato cluster showed marked elevations in antimony, nickel and cadmium.A prespecified, reproducible missing-data workflow was used, including censoring-aware imputation for values below the limit of quantification and measured-subset analyses for metals with substantial assay nonperformance.Matched-set sensitivity analyses supported the main geospatial conclusions, although antimony contrasts were more sensitive to the alternative censoring-likelihood specification than most other metals.These findings support the value of fine-scale human biomonitoring for identifying local exposure signals and prioritizing follow-up environmental and public-health investigations.

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 意大利坎帕尼亚环境压力层的血清痕量金属（SPES）：一项基于人群的横断面生物监测研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景和目标：我们描述了坎帕尼亚（意大利南部）血清微量金属的精细地理变化。材料和方法：2016 年至 2017 年，SPES 计划从坎帕尼亚各地的市政登记处抽取了 20 至 49 岁的居民样本。使用环境压力指数将各城市分为三个广泛的影响层：高影响、中影响和低影响。为了获得更高的空间分辨率，城市还被分为 21 个预定义的城市集群。我们通过 ICP-MS 测量了 20 种血清痕量金属，并估计了年龄和性别调整后的几何平均比 (GMR)，将每个层或簇与研究范围的几何平均值进行比较。结果：在 4205 名注册参与者中，纳入了 4188 名。中等影响区域的汞含量（GMR 1.87，95% CI 1.73-2.02）和锑含量（1.95，1.71-2.23）高于队列平均值。在城市集群规模上，Fonderie Pisano 铸造厂（Baronissi-Pellezzano 和 Salerno）周围的 Irno Valley 集群的汞含量高出约六倍（GMR 5.71 和 6.10），锑含量高出约三倍（3.45 和 2.93），而 Valle del Sabato 集群的锑含量高出约十倍（GMR 10.5），镍含量高出约七倍。 (7.16) 和镉 (7.67)。结论：总体血清金属浓度与欧洲一般人群范围大致相当，但明显的小区域异质性表明省或区域平均值可能掩盖的局部热点。这项基于人群的人体生物监测研究分析了来自意大利坎帕尼亚的 4,188 名成年人的 20 种微量金属血清浓度，比较了高、中、低影响的环境压力地区和 21 个城市集群。尽管总体血清金属浓度与欧洲一般人群范围大致相当，但分析发现了明显的小区域异质性，而这种异质性可能会被更广泛的省或地区摘要所掩盖。中等影响地区的汞和锑含量高于队列平均水平，而集群级分析发现了广泛区域级摘要未捕获的局部热点。伊尔诺山谷集群围绕 Fonderie……

global_hot_topics.title: Identification of PGF+ endothelial cells associated with plaque instability in carotid atherosclerosis by scRNA-seq and RNA-seq analysis.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yi Xiang; Dong Liu; Wenwen Jin; Tao Xu; Leilei Guo; Tingchun Wu; Yuhua Zheng; Xiaoman Xiong
global_hot_topics.abstract: Vascular endothelial dysfunction plays a critical role in the development of atherosclerosis; however, the mechanisms by which endothelial cells contribute to plaque instability remain incompletely understood. In this study, we performed an integrated analysis of single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) and bulk RNA-seq data to characterize endothelial cell heterogeneity associated with carotid plaque instability. Clustering analysis, gene set variation analysis (GSVA), differential gene expression analysis, and KEGG pathway enrichment were conducted to identify key endothelial cell subsets and their functional characteristics. We identified three endothelial cell subsets (subsets 9, 10, and 11) that were significantly enriched in unstable plaques and exhibited upregulation of multiple pro-inflammatory cytokines. Pathway analysis revealed that these subsets were associated with activation of the PI3K - Akt signaling pathway and other inflammation-related pathways. Furthermore, findings were validated in an apolipoprotein E-deficient (ApoE-/-) mouse model, where increased expression of placental growth factor (PGF) and a higher proportion of PGF-positive endothelial cells were observed in atherosclerotic lesions. In conclusion, this study reveals the heterogeneity of endothelial cells in atherosclerotic plaques and identifies pro-inflammatory endothelial subsets potentially associated with plaque instability, providing new insights into the pathogenesis of atherosclerosis.Trial registration: This study was approved by the Experimental Animal Ethics Committee of Guizhou University of Chinese Medicine (approval number: 2,024,010).
global_hot_topics.title_en: Identification of PGF+ endothelial cells associated with plaque instability in carotid atherosclerosis by scRNA-seq and RNA-seq analysis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 通过 scRNA-seq 和 RNA-seq 分析鉴定与颈动脉粥样硬化斑块不稳定性相关的 PGF+ 内皮细胞。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 血管内皮功能障碍在动脉粥样硬化的发展中起着至关重要的作用。然而，内皮细胞导致斑块不稳定的机制仍不完全清楚。在这项研究中，我们对单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 和批量 RNA-seq 数据进行了综合分析，以表征与颈动脉斑块不稳定相关的内皮细胞异质性。通过聚类分析、基因集变异分析（GSVA）、差异基因表达分析和 KEGG 通路富集来识别关键的内皮细胞亚群及其功能特征。我们鉴定了三个内皮细胞亚群（亚群 9、10 和 11），它们在不稳定斑块中显着富集，并表现出多种促炎细胞因子的上调。通路分析显示，这些亚群与 PI3K - Akt 信号通路和其他炎症相关通路的激活相关。此外，研究结果在载脂蛋白 E 缺陷 (ApoE-/-) 小鼠模型中得到验证，在动脉粥样硬化病变中观察到胎盘生长因子 (PGF) 表达增加和 PGF 阳性内皮细胞比例较高。总之，本研究揭示了动脉粥样硬化斑块中内皮细胞的异质性，并鉴定了可能与斑块不稳定相关的促炎内皮亚群，为动脉粥样硬化的发病机制提供了新的见解。 试验注册：本研究经贵州中医药大学实验动物伦理委员会批准（批准号：2,024,010）。

global_hot_topics.title: Democratized single-cell proteomics resolves cell state heterogeneity in skin tumors.
global_hot_topics.authors: Joseph Inns; Andrew Michael Frey; Weng Wi Ng; Matthias Trost; Neil Rajan
global_hot_topics.abstract: Single-cell proteomics (SCP) reveals cellular heterogeneity and biological insights inaccessible to bulk analysis. Existing limitations are cost, sample loss during processing, and accessibility to state-of-the-art instrumentation. We describe a label-free SCP methodology in human tissue, combining FACS, oil-immersion cell handling, mass spectrometry, and neural-network-derived spectral libraries, which address these issues. We tested this methodology in a skin tumor syndrome, CYLD cutaneous syndrome (CCS), assessing tumor heterogeneity. Using a Bruker timsTOF HT platform, we quantified >4,000 proteins, averaging ∼700 per cell, through a cost-effective pipeline without specialised liquid handling infrastructure. By using preexisting bioinformatic tools from the scRNA-seq field, we implemented a robust analysis methodology, discriminating between macrophages, dendritic cells, and tumor keratinocytes, in an unbiased analysis of 419 CCS tumor cells. We validated the biological accuracy of cell annotations by cross referencing with each cell's FACS markers. Furthermore, we identified a novel CCS tumor-associated macrophage population, which carried a tumor microenvironment remodelling signature. Our findings demonstrate an accessible SCP technology capable of yielding novel biological discoveries in clinical tissue.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Democratized single-cell proteomics resolves cell state heterogeneity in skin tumors.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 民主化的单细胞蛋白质组学解决了皮肤肿瘤中细胞状态的异质性。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 单细胞蛋白质组学 (SCP) 揭示了批量分析无法获得的细胞异质性和生物学见解。现有的限制包括成本、处理过程中的样品损失以及最先进仪器的可及性。我们描述了一种人体组织中的无标记 SCP 方法，结合了 FACS、油浸细胞处理、质谱法和神经网络衍生的光谱库，解决了这些问题。我们在皮肤肿瘤综合征、CYLD 皮肤综合征 (CCS) 中测试了这种方法，评估肿瘤异质性。使用 Bruker timsTOF HT 平台，我们通过经济高效的管道（无需专门的液体处理基础设施）对超过 4,000 种蛋白质（平均每个细胞约 700 种）进行了定量。通过使用 scRNA-seq 领域现有的生物信息学工具，我们对 419 个 CCS 肿瘤细胞进行了公正的分析，实施了稳健的分析方法，区分巨噬细胞、树突状细胞和肿瘤角质形成细胞。我们通过与每个细胞的 FACS 标记交叉引用来验证细胞注释的生物学准确性。此外，我们还发现了一种新的 CCS 肿瘤相关巨噬细胞群，其携带肿瘤微环境重塑特征。我们的研究结果证明了一种易于使用的 SCP 技术能够在临床组织中产生新的生物学发现。

核心发现：单细胞蛋白质组学 (SCP) 揭示了批量分析无法获得的细胞异质性和生物学见解。现有的限制包括成本、处理过程中的样品损失以及最先进仪器的可及性。我们描述了一种人体组织中的无标记 SCP 方法，结合了 FACS、油浸细胞处理、质谱法和神经网络衍生的光谱库，解决了这些问题。我们在皮肤肿瘤综合征、CYLD 皮肤综合征 (CCS) 中测试了这种方法，评估肿瘤异质性。使用 Bruker timsTOF HT 平台，我们通过经济高效的管道（无需专门的液体处理基础设施）对超过 4,000 种蛋白质（平均每个细胞约 700 种）进行了定量。通过使用 scRNA-seq 领域现有的生物信息学工具，我们对 419 个 CCS 肿瘤细胞进行了公正的分析，实施了稳健的分析方法，区分巨噬细胞、树突状细胞和肿瘤角质形成细胞。我们通过与每个细胞的 FACS 标记交叉引用来验证细胞注释的生物学准确性。此外，我们还发现了一种新的 CCS 肿瘤相关巨噬细胞群，其携带肿瘤微环境重塑特征。我们的研究结果证明了一种易于使用的 SCP 技术能够在临床组织中产生新的生物学发现。

global_hot_topics.title: Warm intranasal saline irrigation reduces intraoperative blood loss during functional endoscopic sinus surgery: a propensity score-matched cohort study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Yung-Fong Tsai; Yu Chang; Sheng-Dean Luo; Amina M Illias; Shao-Chun Wu
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: To evaluate whether warm intranasal saline irrigation (38-40 °C) during functional endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS) is associated with reduced intraoperative bleeding compared with standard cold irrigation (18-21 °C). METHODS: We performed a single-centre retrospective cohort study of consecutive FESS procedures under inhalational general anaesthesia (January 2017-December 2022). After exclusions, 1,990 cases were eligible. One-to-one propensity score matching (age, sex, ASA class, and type of inhaled anaesthetic) yielded 409 warm and 409 cold cases. Primary outcomes were estimated blood loss and blood loss >50 mL. Secondary outcomes included anaesthesia duration, intraoperative medication requirements, and lowest recorded temperature. Multivariable logistic regression adjusted for BIS monitoring utilisation, intravenous fluid rate, and intraoperative antihypertensive medication use. RESULTS: Median blood loss was 50 mL (IQR 50-50) with warm irrigation versus 50 mL (IQR 50-100) with cold irrigation (p = 0.001). Blood loss >50 mL occurred in 18.6% versus 32.0%, respectively (p < 0.001). Warm irrigation remained independently associated with lower odds of blood loss >50 mL (adjusted OR 0.45, 95% CI 0.31-0.66; p < 0.001). BIS monitoring was also protective (adjusted OR 0.57, 95% CI 0.37-0.87; p = 0.009). Warm irrigation was associated with shorter anaesthesia duration (median 2.82 vs 3.38 h; p < 0.001) and a slightly higher nadir temperature (35.6 vs 35.5 °C; p = 0.007). CONCLUSIONS: Warm intranasal saline irrigation at 38-40 °C was associated with fewer clinically significant bleeding events during routine FESS and may represent a simple, low-cost adjunct to perioperative haemostatic management.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Warm intranasal saline irrigation reduces intraoperative blood loss during functional endoscopic sinus surgery: a propensity score-matched cohort study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 温鼻内盐水冲洗可减少功能性内窥镜鼻窦手术期间的术中失血：一项倾向评分匹配队列研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：旨在评估功能性内窥镜鼻窦手术 (FESS) 期间与标准冷冲洗 (18-21 °C) 相比，温鼻内盐水冲洗 (38-40 °C) 是否与减少术中出血相关。方法：我们对吸入全身麻醉下连续 FESS 手术（2017 年 1 月至 2022 年 12 月）进行了单中心回顾性队列研究。排除后，有 1,990 例符合资格。一对一倾向评分匹配（年龄、性别、ASA 类别和吸入麻醉剂类型）产生 409 例热病例和 409 例冷病例。主要结局是估计失血量和失血量> 50 mL。次要结局包括麻醉持续时间、术中药物需求和最低记录体温。根据 BIS 监测利用率、静脉输液速度和术中抗高血压药物使用情况调整多变量逻辑回归。结果：温冲洗的中位失血量为 50 mL (IQR 50-50)，而冷冲洗的中位失血量为 50 mL (IQR 50-100) (p = 0.001)。失血 >50 mL 的比例分别为 18.6% 和 32.0% (p < 0.001)。温水冲洗仍然与较低的失血率 > 50 mL 独立相关（调整后 OR 0.45，95% CI 0.31-0.66；p < 0.001）。 BIS 监测也具有保护作用（调整后 OR 0.57，95% CI 0.37-0.87；p = 0.009）。温水冲洗与较短的麻醉持续时间（中位 2.82 vs 3.38 小时；p < 0.001）和稍高的最低温度（35.6 vs 35.5 °C；p = 0.007）相关。结论：38-40°C 的温热鼻内盐水冲洗与常规 FESS 期间临床显着出血事件的减少相关，并且可能是围手术期止血管理的一种简单、低成本的辅助手段。

global_hot_topics.title: Advances in SEC61G research: from ER translocon subunit to emerging pan-cancer oncogenic roles.
global_hot_topics.abstract: SEC61G, the γ subunit of the Sec61 translocon, has long been regarded as a passenger co-amplification target of EGFR on chromosome 7p11.2. Recent studies have revealed its independent oncogenic functions across multiple cancers. This review proposes a mechanism-based classification of SEC61G oncogenic activities: (1) immune checkpoint regulation via canonical translocation; (2) aberrant calcium signaling; and (3) non-canonical mechanisms independent of channel functions. We further delineate the pan-cancer expression and CRISPR-Cas9 dependency landscape, highlighting a dual "high expression, high dependency" profile in cervical squamous cell carcinoma. We distinguish current pore-targeting Sec61 inhibitors from subunit-specific strategies and propose future directions including PROTAC degraders and PPI inhibitors. Our review identifies SEC61G as a pan‑cancer prognostic biomarker and immunotherapy response predictor, with mechanistic evidence supporting its driver roles in glioblastoma, non‑small cell lung cancer, and colorectal cancer, whereas associations in other cancers remain correlative and require further validation.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Advances in SEC61G research: from ER translocon subunit to emerging pan-cancer oncogenic roles.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: SEC61G 研究进展：从 ER 易位子亚基到新兴的泛癌致癌作用。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: SEC61G是Sec61易位子的γ亚基，长期以来被认为是染色体7p11.2上EGFR的乘客共扩增靶标。最近的研究揭示了其在多种癌症中的独立致癌功能。本综述提出了基于机制的 SEC61G 致癌活性分类：（1）通过经典易位进行免疫检查点调节； (2) 钙信号传导异常； (3) 独立于通道功能的非规范机制。我们进一步描绘了泛癌表达和 CRISPR-Cas9 依赖性景观，强调了宫颈鳞状细胞癌中的双重“高表达、高依赖性”特征。我们将当前的孔靶向 Sec61 抑制剂与亚基特异性策略区分开来，并提出了未来的方向，包括 PROTAC 降解剂和 PPI 抑制剂。我们的综述将 SEC61G 确定为泛癌预后生物标志物和免疫治疗反应预测因子，机制证据支持其在胶质母细胞瘤、非小细胞肺癌和结直肠癌中的驱动作用，而其他癌症中的关联仍然相关，需要进一步验证。

global_hot_topics.title: Consensus and learning climate in temporary versus permanent teams in team-based learning.
global_hot_topics.authors: Michaela Wagner-Menghin; Stefan Heber; Ivo Volf; Richard Marz; Michael J M Fischer
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: In team-based learning, students are typically placed in fixed teams based on the idea that stable group membership fosters collaboration: as teammates get to know each other, they share more information, resolve differences and feel motivated to contribute. This rationale had not been tested in a randomized controlled trial. OBJECTIVE: The study compares team-based learning in temporary teams with the default permanent teams regarding individual and team readiness assurance test performance (iRAT, tRAT), reaching team consensus, the learning climate, and intrinsic motivation. DESIGN: In a randomized controlled trial, first-year medical students were assigned either to permanent TBL teams or to teams that were re-assigned for each problem. The team readiness assurance test (tRAT) votes, submitted individually and covertly, served as an indirect indicator for team consensus (concordant versus discordant tRAT vote). RESULTS: Discordant tRATs (n = 268, 11.8% of all votes) were submitted more frequently in temporary than in permanent teams, both for correct and incorrect majority decisions. The self-rated learning climate was more cooperative in permanent than in temporary teams, while intrinsic motivation and tRAT scores were similar for both types of teams. A poorer learning climate was associated with a higher proportion of discordant tRATs. CONCLUSION: Working in temporary teams does not lead to inferior intrinsic motivation; this was previously also shown for knowledge gain. However, the poorer learning climate, together with reaching a consensus less often, might indicate that at least some members of temporary teams feel not adequately appreciated in the discussion and do not accept the majority decision. With instructional strategies promoting a cooperative learning climate in temporary teams, preclinical TBL courses might serve as an early promoter of the relational team competencies required for subsequent clinical workplace learning in temporary teams.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Consensus and learning climate in temporary versus permanent teams in team-based learning.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 在基于团队的学习中，临时团队与永久团队的共识和学习氛围。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：在基于团队的学习中，学生通常被安排在固定的团队中，因为稳定的团队成员可以促进协作：随着团队成员相互了解，他们会分享更多信息，解决差异并感到有动力做出贡献。这一基本原理尚未在随机对照试验中得到检验。目的：该研究将临时团队中基于团队的学习与默认永久团队的个人和团队准备保证测试表现（iRAT、tRAT）、达成团队共识、学习氛围和内在动机进行比较。设计：在一项随机对照试验中，一年级医学生被分配到永久 TBL 团队或针对每个问题重新分配的团队。单独秘密提交的团队准备保证测试 (tRAT) 投票作为团队共识的间接指标（一致与不一致的 tRAT 投票）。结果：临时团队中提交不一致的 tRAT（n = 268，占所有选票的 11.8%）的频率高于永久团队，无论是正确还是错误的多数决策。永久团队的自评学习气氛比临时团队更加合作，而两种类型团队的内在动机和 tRAT 分数相似。较差的学习氛围与较高比例的不一致 tRAT 相关。结论：在临时团队中工作并不会导致内在动力下降；以前也曾证明过这一点是为了获得知识。然而，较差的学习氛围，加上达成共识的频率较低，可能表明至少临时团队的一些成员在讨论中感到没有得到充分的重视，并且不接受多数人的决定。通过在临时团队中促进合作学习氛围的教学策略，临床前 TBL 课程可以作为临时团队中后续临床工作场所学习所需的关系团队能力的早期促进者。

global_hot_topics.title: Perinatal ampicillin exposure alters murine maternal fecal bile acid and acylcarnitine profiles.
global_hot_topics.authors: Simone Zuffa; Sydney P Thomas; Abubaker Patan; Ipsita Mohanty; Yasin El Abiead; Victoria Deleray; Kine Eide Kvitne; Armin Kousha
global_hot_topics.abstract: Maternal intrapartum antibiotic prophylaxis (IAP) and postpartum maternal antibiotic usage are increasingly common and have been linked to altered growth and immune development in offspring. However, the mechanisms underlying these effects, particularly those arising from indirect early-life exposure to antibiotics, remain poorly understood. Here, using a preclinical murine model, we examined the impact of in vivo antepartum and postpartum maternal ampicillin administration on the maternal fecal microbiome and metabolome. Ampicillin treatment resulted in a significant depletion of bacterial species belonging to the Muribaculaceae family, including Muribaculum intestinale and Duncaniella dubosii, accompanied by a cohort-dependent enrichment of Enterococcus and Prevotella species. These microbial shifts coincided with substantial and reproducible metabolic remodeling, including elevated fecal acylcarnitines and altered bile acid profiles. Notably, we identified two previously uncharacterized trihydroxylated bile acids conjugated to a hexose moiety, which we annotated as cholic acid-galactose and taurocholic acid-galactose and synthesized. These metabolites were consistently associated with antibiotic exposure across public metabolomics data repositories. Finally, alterations in the maternal fecal microbiome and metabolome were associated with increased weight gain in offspring, suggesting potential pathways by which maternal antibiotic exposure may influence early developmental outcomes. These findings highlight microbial and metabolic signatures linked to perinatal antibiotic use and underscore the need to balance infection control with long-term infant health considerations.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Perinatal ampicillin exposure alters murine maternal fecal bile acid and acylcarnitine profiles.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 围产期氨苄西林暴露会改变小鼠母体粪便胆汁酸和酰基肉碱的分布。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 母亲产时抗生素预防（IAP）和产后母亲抗生素的使用越来越普遍，并且与后代生长和免疫发育的改变有关。然而，这些影响的机制，特别是那些因生命早期间接接触抗生素而产生的机制，仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们使用临床前小鼠模型，研究了产前和产后体内氨苄西林给药对母体粪便微生物组和代谢组的影响。氨苄青霉素治疗导致属于 Muribaculaceae 家族的细菌种类显着减少，包括肠粘膜杆菌和 Dubosii 邓卡尼菌，同时伴随着肠球菌和普雷沃菌属的队列依赖性富集。这些微生物的变化与大量且可重复的代谢重塑同时发生，包括粪便酰基肉碱升高和胆汁酸谱改变。值得注意的是，我们鉴定了两种先前未表征的与己糖部分缀合的三羟基化胆汁酸，我们将其注释为胆酸-半乳糖和牛磺胆酸-半乳糖并合成。这些代谢物在公共代谢组学数据存储库中始终与抗生素暴露相关。最后，母体粪便微生物组和代谢组的改变与后代体重增加有关，这表明母体抗生素暴露可能影响早期发育结果的潜在途径。这些发现强调了与围产期抗生素使用相关的微生物和代谢特征，并强调需要平衡感染控制与婴儿长期健康考虑。

global_hot_topics.title: Efficacy and safety of cabozantinib plus nivolumab in advanced non-clear cell renal cell carcinoma: a nationwide multicenter study.
global_hot_topics.authors: Chang Gon Kim; Junkyu Kim; In-Ho Kim; Eun Hee Jung; Hyeon-Su Im; Byung Woog Kang; Ji Hyun Park; Joo-Hwan Park
global_hot_topics.abstract: Non-clear cell renal cell carcinoma (nccRCC) represents a biologically heterogeneous group of tumors for which optimal systemic treatment strategies remain poorly defined despite recent therapeutic advances. To address this gap, we evaluated the clinical activity and safety of cabozantinib plus nivolumab in patients with advanced nccRCC. In this nationwide, multicenter retrospective cohort study conducted in the Republic of Korea, 62 patients received the combination across multiple lines of therapy, with most treated in the first-line setting. Papillary RCC was the most common histologic subtype (50.0%), followed by FH-deficient (22.6%), TFE3-rearranged (9.7%), chromophobe (6.5%), collecting duct (6.5%), and unclassified tumors (4.8%). With a median follow-up of 22.2 months (95% confidence interval [CI], 15.4-29.1), the objective response rate (ORR) was 45.2% (95% CI, 32.4-57.9) and the disease control rate (DCR) was 93.6% (95% CI, 87.3-99.8). Responses were seen across histologic subtypes (ORR = 48.4% in papillary, 50.0% in FH-deficient, 50.0% in TFE3-rearranged, 25.0% in chromophobe, 25.0% in collecting duct, and 33.3% in unclassified tumors; P = 0.876). Median progression-free and overall survival were 9.7 months (95% CI, 7.7-11.6) and 22.0 months (95% CI, 15.2-28.7), respectively. Grade 3-4 treatment-emergent adverse events occurred in 46.8% of patients, and treatment discontinuation due to toxicity was reported in 6.5%. These findings demonstrate that cabozantinib plus nivolumab provides clinically meaningful and durable antitumor activity with manageable toxicity across diverse histologic subtypes in advanced nccRCC, supporting further prospective evaluation of cabozantinib plus nivolumab in advanced nccRCC.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Efficacy and safety of cabozantinib plus nivolumab in advanced non-clear cell renal cell carcinoma: a nationwide multicenter study.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 卡博替尼联合纳武单抗治疗晚期非透明细胞肾细胞癌的疗效和安全性：一项全国性多中心研究。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 非透明细胞肾细胞癌（nccRCC）代表了一组生物异质性肿瘤，尽管最近的治疗取得了进展，但最佳的全身治疗策略仍然不明确。为了弥补这一差距，我们评估了卡博替尼加纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 患者中的临床活性和安全性。在这项在韩国进行的全国性多中心回顾性队列研究中，62 名患者接受了多线联合治疗，其中大多数在一线治疗中接受治疗。乳头状肾细胞癌是最常见的组织学亚型（50.0%），其次是FH缺陷型（22.6%）、TFE3重排型（9.7%）、嫌色型（6.5%）、集合管型（6.5%）和未分类肿瘤（4.8%）。中位随访时间为 22.2 个月（95% 置信区间 [CI]，15.4-29.1），客观缓解率（ORR）为 45.2%（95% CI，32.4-57.9），疾病控制率（DCR）为 93.6%（95% CI，87.3-99.8）。不同组织学亚型均有缓解（ORR = 乳头状肿瘤为 48.4%，FH 缺陷型为 50.0%，TFE3 重排型为 50.0%，嫌色细胞为 25.0%，集合管为 25.0%，未分类肿瘤为 33.3%；P = 0.876）。中位无进展生存期和总生存期分别为 9.7 个月（95% CI，7.7-11.6）和 22.0 个月（95% CI，15.2-28.7）。 46.8% 的患者发生 3-4 级治疗引起的不良事件，6.5% 的患者因毒性而停止治疗。这些研究结果表明，卡博替尼联合纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 的不同组织学亚型中提供了具有临床意义和持久的抗肿瘤活性，且毒性可控，支持对卡博替尼联合纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 中的进一步前瞻性评估。

核心发现：非透明细胞肾细胞癌（nccRCC）代表了一组生物异质性肿瘤，尽管最近的治疗取得了进展，但最佳的全身治疗策略仍然不明确。为了弥补这一差距，我们评估了卡博替尼加纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 患者中的临床活性和安全性。在这项在韩国进行的全国性多中心回顾性队列研究中，62 名患者接受了多线联合治疗，其中大多数在一线治疗中接受治疗。乳头状肾细胞癌是最常见的组织学亚型（50.0%），其次是FH缺陷型（22.6%）、TFE3重排型（9.7%）、嫌色型（6.5%）、集合管型（6.5%）和未分类肿瘤（4.8%）。中位随访时间为 22.2 个月（95% 置信区间 [CI]，15.4-29.1），客观缓解率（ORR）为 45.2%（95% CI，32.4-57.9），疾病控制率（DCR）为 93.6%（95% CI，87.3-99.8）。不同组织学亚型均有缓解（ORR = 乳头状肿瘤为 48.4%，FH 缺陷型为 50.0%，TFE3 重排型为 50.0%，嫌色细胞为 25.0%，集合管为 25.0%，未分类肿瘤为 33.3%；P = 0.876）。中位无进展生存期和总生存期分别为 9.7 个月（95% CI，7.7-11.6）和 22.0 个月（95% CI，15.2-28.7）。 46.8% 的患者发生 3-4 级治疗引起的不良事件，6.5% 的患者因毒性而停止治疗。这些研究结果表明，卡博替尼联合纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 的不同组织学亚型中提供了具有临床意义和持久的抗肿瘤活性，且毒性可控，支持对卡博替尼联合纳武单抗在晚期 nccRCC 中的进一步前瞻性评估。

medical_news.title: A common vitamin could help fight one of the deadliest brain cancers
medical_news.abstract: A clinical trial is exploring whether high doses of vitamin B3 could give patients with glioblastoma a better chance against the aggressive brain cancer. Scientists found that niacin may help revive immune cells that tumors shut down, allowing them to attack cancer more effectively. Early results have been promising, with patients showing significantly better progression-free survival than expected.

medical_news.title: New vitamin B12 therapy shows promise against deadly brain cancer
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a vitamin B12–based compound that can cross the blood-brain barrier and home in on glioblastoma tumors. In animal studies, the compound accumulated preferentially in tumor tissue and delivered sustained nitric oxide directly to cancer cells. It also worked synergistically with existing glioblastoma treatments, significantly enhancing their tumor-fighting effects.

medical_news.title: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.abstract: Creatine is best known as a muscle-building supplement, but scientists are now investigating whether it could also help treat depression by boosting the brain's energy supply. A new review examined five randomized clinical trials involving 238 participants and found mixed results. Two studies, both involving women with major depressive disorder, reported that adding creatine to standard treatment improved symptoms, while three others found no meaningful benefit.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists say creatine may help fight depression
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家称肌酸可能有助于对抗抑郁症
medical_news.abstract_cn: 肌酸最著名的是一种肌肉增强补充剂，但科学家们现在正在研究它是否也可以通过增加大脑的能量供应来帮助治疗抑郁症。一项新的综述审查了 5 项涉及 238 名参与者的随机临床试验，发现结果好坏参半。两项研究均涉及患有重度抑郁症的女性，报告称在标准治疗中添加肌酸可以改善症状，而其他三项研究则没有发现任何有意义的益处。

medical_news.title: Creatine Shows Mixed Results in Treating Depression
medical_news.abstract: A new study reveals a split decision on using creatine to treat depression. While combining creatine with standard therapy or antidepressants significantly accelerated remission in adult women, it failed in adolescent, treatment-resistant, and bipolar cohorts, even triggering mania in some bipolar patients.

medical_news.title: Researchers Grow Rare Eye Vessel Cells to Halt Vision Loss
medical_news.abstract: A new study demonstrates the first successful generation of retinal endothelial cells from induced pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs). When tested in vitro, the cells accurately modeled the tissue degradation of diabetic retinopathy, and when injected in vivo, they successfully integrated to regenerate damaged retinal blood vessels and restore function.

medical_news.title: Twin Technology for Restoring Sight and Touch
medical_news.abstract: Brain-computer interface (BCI) technologies developed independently for 50 years to restore sight and touch are functionally identical, establishing a unified framework that accelerates neuroprosthetic development for both blind and paralyzed patients.
medical_news.title_en: Twin Technology for Restoring Sight and Touch
medical_news.title_cn: 恢复视力和触觉的双技术

medical_news.title: BCI Headset Detects Hidden Consciousness in Patients
medical_news.abstract: A new study uses a wearable EEG headset with real-time auditory feedback to nearly double the detection rate of hidden consciousness in unresponsive brain-injured patients from 39% to 69%.
medical_news.title_en: BCI Headset Detects Hidden Consciousness in Patients

medical_news.title: New brain study reveals speech learning works differently than we thought
medical_news.abstract: A new study suggests that learning and remembering speech relies more on how the brain processes sounds and sensations than on the areas that control mouth and face movements. The discovery could reshape speech therapy and help improve future brain-based communication technologies.
medical_news.title_en: New brain study reveals speech learning works differently than we thought
medical_news.title_cn: 新的大脑研究表明言语学习的工作方式与我们想象的不同
medical_news.abstract_cn: 一项新的研究表明，学习和记忆言语更多地依赖于大脑如何处理声音和感觉，而不是控制嘴巴和面部运动的区域。这一发现可能会重塑言语治疗，并有助于改善未来基于大脑的通信技术。

medical_news.title: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging
medical_news.abstract: Vitamin B12 is needed in microscopic amounts, but a shortage can have major effects on health and energy. The vitamin was first linked to a lifesaving liver treatment for pernicious anemia nearly 100 years ago. Today, researchers are finding that B12 may also help keep cellular powerhouses called mitochondria functioning properly. This could explain why some people experience fatigue and brain fog even before traditional signs of deficiency show up.
medical_news.title_en: This common vitamin deficiency can mimic normal aging
medical_news.title_cn: 这种常见的维生素缺乏症可以模拟正常的衰老过程
medical_news.abstract_cn: 维生素 B12 的需求量极小，但缺乏会对健康和能量产生重大影响。大约 100 年前，这种维生素首次被用于治疗恶性贫血的挽救生命的肝脏治疗方法。如今，研究人员发现 B12 还可能有助于保持称为线粒体的细胞发电站正常运转。这可以解释为什么有些人甚至在传统的缺乏症状出现之前就感到疲劳和脑雾。
